deposit_account_no.text: เลขที่บัญชี

root.sql: SELECT vr_nsk_015_012000.membership_no, vr_nsk_015_012000.deposit_account_no, vr_nsk_015_012000.deposit_account_name, vr_nsk_015_012000.seq_no, vr_nsk_015_012000.item_type, vr_nsk_015_012000.operate_date, vr_nsk_015_012000.last_calcint_date, vr_nsk_015_012000.calpaidintdate, vr_nsk_015_012000.deposit_balance, vr_nsk_015_012000.total_balance , vr_nsk_015_012000.deposit_type_code , vr_nsk_015_012000.deposit_name FROM vr_nsk_015_012000 ,sc_dep_m_rule ,sc_dep_m_creditor where 1=1 and vr_nsk_015_012000.operate_date between '!operate_date_1!' and '!operate_date_2!' and vr_nsk_015_012000.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code and vr_nsk_015_012000.deposit_account_no = sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no /*WHERE*/
